work_unit: 瞭望/wait 轮 3/3 — DEADLOCK-ARCHIVE 终结轮。audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress + derived_fixes 2 全 pending(dispatched case-2026-07-05-048 on opt-oneday-design-1783210640 cb4c800 pushed origin，非未派发)。前序: case-049 wait1, case-050 wait2，本轮 case-051 wait3/3。规则(fix-in-progress 轮 + autonomous-constraints.md 卡死保护 + loop instructions): derived_fixes 全 pending(dispatched) → 走 wait 路径(scout-scan 快照 + 实证 wt 完整性)；连续 3 轮 wait 无人 merge → deadlock protection → finding status pending→rejected-archive → status cycle-complete → 下轮触发新全量审计(镜像 autonomous-engine audit-005 case-046 / sunset audit-003 case-036 / PA audit-002 case-026 / wechat-main audit-001 case-016 三轮 wait→deadlock-archive 模式)。本轮为第 3 轮 wait 且实证仍无人 merge → 执行 deadlock-archive。

action: (1) 读 autonomous-constraints.md 全文 + audit-cycle-state.json 全文确认本轮=wait 3/3 + 2 pending(dispatched) + _wait_round_count=2。 (2) scout-scan --workspace /home/admin/workspace 跑瞭望快照: 1BfrYW9R score=0.0 #3 健康良好; autonomous-engine/skills score=1.0 列 #1/#2 但本轮是 wait 路径不走 scout #1 选择。 (3) 实证 wt + merge 状态(关键证据，非散文): cd 1BfrYW9R; git log --oneline -1→0a0982d; git merge-base --is-ancestor cb4c800 HEAD→NOT merged(退出1); git branch -a --contains cb4c800→仅 auto/opt-oneday-design-1783210640+remotes/origin/auto/...(master/onedaybot-dev 不含); git ls-remote origin refs/heads/master→8c6f96418...≠cb4c800(master 远端未 merge)。wt 自身完整: git worktree list→/home/admin/workspace/.opt-worktrees/1BfrYW9R/opt-oneday-design-1783210640 cb4c800 [auto/opt-oneday-design-1783210640]; origin 同步: remotes/origin/auto/opt-oneday-design-1783210640 存在。 (4) DEADLOCK-ARCHIVE 执行: python3 改 audit-cycle-state.json — 两 derived_fixes(OD-SEC-01/OD-SEC-03) status pending→rejected-archive + _status_meaning 写 'deadlock-archive: 3 consecutive wait rounds (case-049 wait1, case-050 wait2, case-051 wait3) with no human merge to master (master HEAD=8c6f96418, cb4c800 never merged). Deadlock protection triggered 2026-07-05. wt+branch+origin preserved for deferred merge. superseded-by-cycle-deadlock'; current_audit_status→'cycle-complete (...)'; status→'cycle-complete'; pending_count 2→0; _awaiting_merge_count 2→0; _wait_round_count 2→3; _status_note 写 DEADLOCK-ARCHIVE 3/3 说明; last_audit_completed_at 更新; next_audit_trigger_reason='pending-fixes-cleared'; history 里 audit-2026-07-05-006 条目 fixes_merged_at→'deadlock-archive' + _note 补 deadlock 段 + oneday-design 标已审不重审。 (5) 不重复派发(避免 churn, autonomous-constraints.md 自指 churn 禁令); 不删 wt(branch+origin 保留待人工后 merge, 镜像前 5 个 deadlock 案例的保留策略)。 (6) 同步 autonomous-state.md: GOAL_STATUS=active, LAST_OUTCOME=done, NEXT_SUGGESTION=下轮触发新全量深审(选未深审过的项目)。
